info.description: This is the API server for DPC Tools.
info.title: DPC Tools API

post.description: Authenticate user and return session token

get.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated user

post.description: Register a new user in the system
Create a new chat channel within a workplace or project

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific chat channel by its ID
Retrieve paginated messages for a specific chat channel

post.description: Send a new chat message to a specific channel

get.description: Retrieve all organizations the current user is a member of

post.description: Create a new organization and assign the creator as ADMIN

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific organization by its ID

post.description: Create a new project in a specific workplace

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific project by its ID
Retrieve all tasks within a specific project

post.description: Create a new task in a specific project

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific task by its ID

put.description: Update details of an existing task

get.description: Retrieve all projects within a specific workplace
Establishes a WebSocket connection for real-time communication
